transport.title: My Transports
transport.empty_hint: Create your first request by tapping +
transport.position_unavailable_message: The driver has not shared their location yet. Real-time tracking will be available once they enable location sharing.
transport.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this request?
transport.immediate_order_desc: Driver dispatched as soon as possible
transport.cancellation_info: You can cancel this request for free up to 2 hours before the scheduled time slot.
transport.cancel_request_message: Are you sure you want to cancel this transport request? This action is irreversible.
transport.cancel_request_message_inapp: Are you sure you want to cancel? Depending on the time before your slot, a refund may or may not be issued.
transport.cancelled_success: Your request has been successfully cancelled.
transport.cancel_refund_full: Your request has been cancelled. A full refund will be credited within a few days.
transport.cancel_refund_none: Your request has been cancelled. No refund will be issued as the cancellation was made less than 2 hours before the scheduled slot.
transport.cancel_refund_partial: Your request has been cancelled. A {{pct}}% refund will be processed.
transport.cancel_arrived_warning: The driver is already at the pickup point. If you cancel without a valid reason (wrong vehicle or missing services), a late cancellation fee will apply.
transport.cancel_heading_warning: The driver is on the way. If they have been en route for more than 5 minutes and you cancel without a valid reason, a late cancellation fee may apply.
transport.cancel_fee_charged: Your request has been cancelled. A late cancellation fee of {{amount}} {{currency}} will be charged before your next order.
transport.pending_fee_message: You have an outstanding late cancellation fee of {{amount}} {{currency}}. You will need to settle it before placing a new order.
transport.searching_driver: We are looking for an available driver...
transport.driver_accepted: A driver has accepted your request!
transport.distance_info: Distance and duration will be calculated upon validation
transport.location_permission_msg: We need your location to fill in the address.
transport.location_error: Unable to retrieve address for this location.
transport.coordinates_missing_msg: Please select an address from the suggestions.
transport.coordinates_invalid_msg: Unable to calculate distance. Please check the addresses.
transport.helpers_desc: Assistants to help you load and unload
transport.services_info: Selected services will be added to the total price. You can skip this step if you don't need any additional services.
transport.step4_question: When would you like the transport?
transport.flexible_info: The driver will choose the best slot based on availability and will contact you to confirm the exact time.
transport.immediate_hint: An available driver will be automatically assigned within 30 seconds.
transport.scheduled_hint: Choose your preferred date and time slot.
transport.today_slot_warning: Some time slots are no longer available for today.
transport.slot_unavailable_msg: This time slot has already passed for today. Please choose another slot or date.
transport.immediate_unavailable_msg: Immediate requests are available between {{start}}h and {{end}}h. Would you like to schedule instead?
transport.immediate_unavailable_info: ⚠️ Immediate requests are only available between {{start}}h and {{end}}h. You can schedule a date instead.
transport.immediate_info: ⚡ Immediate request: an admin can assign a driver within the first 30 seconds. After that, the best available driver will be selected automatically.
transport.request_created_msg: Your transport request has been registered. We are looking for an available driver.
transport.create_failed: Unable to create the request. Please try again.
transport.what_to_transport: What would you like to transport?
transport.volume_help_note: Tap to add to total volume
transport.upload_error_msg:
Unable to upload photos: {{error}}

Do you want to continue without photos?
transport.camera_permission_msg: We need permission to access your camera.
transport.photo_limit_msg: You can add a maximum of 5 photos.
transport.description_required_msg: Please describe the items to transport.
transport.volume_required_msg: Please estimate the volume of your load.
transport.completion_subtitle_driver: By confirming, you attest to having delivered the package to the recipient.
transport.completion_subtitle_client: By confirming, you attest to having received your package.
transport.completion_already_subtitle_driver: You have already confirmed the delivery of this transport.
transport.completion_already_subtitle_client: You have already confirmed the receipt of this transport.

transport.review_success_msg: Your review has been saved successfully

history.empty_client: Your transport requests will appear here

driver.unavailable_subtitle: You will not receive new deliveries

driver.photos_mandatory_notice: Photos required — without photos you cannot proceed to the next step.

driver.photos_after_done_msg: Photos saved. Delivery marked as completed.

driver.commission_paid_success_msg: Your commission debt has been settled. Cash payments are now available again.
driver.cancel_delivery_warning: ⚠️ Cancelling a delivery will affect your driver score. A reason is mandatory.
driver.cancel_delivery_immediate_warning: ⚠️ This is an IMMEDIATE request. The client is waiting for a driver right now. Cancelling will affect your score.
driver.cancel_delivery_planned_warning: You are cancelling a planned delivery. Please provide a reason to inform the client.
driver.cancel_reason_placeholder: Explain why you are cancelling this delivery...
driver.cancel_reason_required: A reason is required to cancel.

support.phone_subtitle: As a last resort, call our team

home.title: Home
home.slide1_sub: Electricity, plumbing, painting… book in seconds

home.slide3_sub: Buy and sell handcrafted products near you
home.feat1_desc: All our providers are verified and certified before joining the platform

home.feat4_desc: Expanding network in Egypt, France, Algeria, Morocco and Senegal

payment.title: Payment
payment.escrow_note: Your payment will be held in escrow and released once the service is completed.
payment.success_msg: Your payment has been confirmed and is held in escrow.
payment.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this payment?
payment.escrow_explanation_pending: Your payment has not been processed yet.
payment.escrow_explanation_captured: Your payment is secured. It will be released to the driver once the service is completed.
payment.escrow_explanation_held: Your payment is held securely and will be released once both parties confirm completion.
payment.escrow_explanation_released: The payment has been released to the driver after successful completion.
payment.pending_payment_notice: This request requires in-app payment. Please complete payment to confirm your booking.

cash_validation.title: Cash Payment Validation
cash_validation.driver_subtitle: Confirm the amount you received from the client
cash_validation.client_subtitle: Confirm the amount you paid to the driver
cash_validation.warning: ⚠️ The amount differs by more than 1% from the expected price. This may trigger a manual review.
cash_validation.info: ℹ️ Payment will be automatically validated if both amounts match (1% tolerance). If there is a discrepancy, a dispute will be created for admin review.
